name: check_availability
description: Check open appointment slots for the next few days. Call this whenever the caller wants to book an appointment, before asking for their details.

name: book_appointment
description: Book a confirmed appointment slot for the patient. Only call this after the caller has chosen a specific time from check_availability and you have collected their name and phone number.

iso_start_time.description: The exact ISO 8601 timestamp of the slot the caller chose, taken from the check_availability result.

notes.description: Reason for visit or any relevant notes, e.g. 'new patient consult' or 'tooth pain follow-up'.
